title: Generate AstNode members via astgen
body:
Before I go all in on this (which will be tedious), posting for initial comments on whether you like this.

astgen now generates the methods previous added via the ASTNODE\_\*FUNC\* macros (so we reduce boilerplace), and in addition can generate operand accessors.

See these on how the operands are declared:
https://github.com/gezalore/verilator/blob/39b673d4a40be99676d4efb7442c17e07df6feb7/src/V3AstNodeMath.h#L62-L64
https://github.com/gezalore/verilator/blob/39b673d4a40be99676d4efb7442c17e07df6feb7/src/V3AstNodeOther.h#L35
https://github.com/gezalore/verilator/blob/39b673d4a40be99676d4efb7442c17e07df6feb7/src/V3AstNodeOther.h#L58-L65

An operand can be either scalar - cannot be nullptr - (Ast*), optional scalar - which can be nullptr - (Optional[Ast*]), or list (List[Ast*]). Scalar and optional are implemented the same way but the metadata is useful for documentation and later generation of checks
